content.title: [consolidate] (smt.string_solver=z3str3) Refutation Soundness issue on String Theory
content.excerpt:
Hi,
For following formula, z3str3 9d9414c1110bc65108202cdcc473c703d12b54f1 returns unsat but z3 returns sat.
I confirm this formula is satisfiable and z3 is correct.
I seems this bug is caused by z3str3 with str.replace, str.++.
```
$ z3 smt.string_solver=z3str3 small.smt2
unsat
$ z3 small.smt2
sat
$ cat small.smt2
(set-logic QF_S)
(declare-const x Bool)
(declare-fun T () String)
(declare-fun T1 () String)
(declare-fun T3 () String)
(declare-fun T5 () String)
(declare-fun v () St
